svg.title: Phase 2 – worker inference loop
svg.desc: Worker dequeues job, opens video stream, loops frame by frame sampling every 5th frame, runs letterbox resize then YOLO ONNX inference, checks goal algorithm, computes interval on detection, saves thumbnail and result to Redis.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is in the queued job payload?')
sendPrompt('Should the worker download the video or stream it?')
sendPrompt('What happens when cap.read() returns False?')
sendPrompt('What happens when the loop finishes?')
sendPrompt('Why letterbox instead of plain resize for YOLO input?')
g.text: pad to keep aspect ratio, no distortion

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does YOLO output — what format are the bboxes?')
sendPrompt('How exactly does the bbox intersection check work?')
sendPrompt('How to handle interval going below 0 or past video end?')
g.text: start = max(0, ts-5s) end = min(duration, ts+5s)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What exactly is saved per interval in Redis?')
